赏金猎人公会
审核与分配部

赏金猎人公会已授权一项正式赏金。

被悬赏人：[TARGET] 
预估风险：高
最后已知位置：[LOCATION]
已知所属组织：未知
注意：这名特定目标已被证明非常难以抓捕。他们往往会隐藏起来，除非出现足以引起他们注意的巨大威胁。正因如此，你和你的支援队伍需要消灭足够多的手下以激怒他们。只需留在原地，消灭任何出现的敌对目标，目标最终应该会现身。


赏金猎人公会
追求正义

赏金猎人公会是由雇佣兵公会认可的安全服务机构，根据《外星贸易授权法案》授权在地球联合帝国和其他地区开展业务。

BHG_ShipWaveAttack_DrawOutBoss_VH_Desc_0.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
-------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT ---------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Very High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: Unknown
NOTES: This particular target has proven very difficult to capture. They are seldom seen unless they are required to deal with a large enough threat personally. That's why you and your support crew will need to take out enough of their underlings to ensure they come to engage you. Just stay put, take out any hostiles that show up, and the target should eventually show themselves.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
BHG_ShipWaveAttack_DrawOutBoss_VH_Desc_0.tr:
--------------------------------------------------------
--------------     赏   金    合   约    ---------------
--------------------------------------------------------

赏金猎人公会
审核与分配部

赏金猎人公会已授权一项正式赏金。

被悬赏人：[TARGET] 
预估风险：很高
最后已知位置：[LOCATION]
已知所属组织：未知
注意：这名特定目标已被证明非常难以抓捕。除非需要亲自处理足够大的威胁，否则他们很少露面。正因如此，你和你的支援队伍需要消灭足够多的手下以确保他们前来与你交战。只需留在原地，消灭任何出现的敌对目标，目标最终应该会现身。


赏金猎人公会
追求正义

赏金猎人公会是由雇佣兵公会认可的安全服务机构，根据《外星贸易授权法案》授权在地球联合帝国和其他地区开展业务。

InterSec_ResourceGathering_Cryopods_Desc.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: <EM4>Cargo Capable Ship</EM4>, Personal Arms, <EM4>Heavy-Duty Tractor Beam</EM4>
Briefing: 
Our latest intel shows that the Shattered Blade have replenished their stock of Vanduul corpses and will shortly be transferring them from the old <EM4>QV Logistics station</EM4>they're operating from to an interested buyer. The UEE can't have another incident like what happened with ASD so they're eager for us to <EM4>recover the cryopods</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>the freight elevator at [DESTINATION]</EM4>.

While the Shattered Blade members present at the site might offer resistance, they are not the focus of you mission. Deal with them as needed and get the cryopods. 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
InterSec_ResourceGathering_Cryopods_Desc.tr:
任务说明

行动区域：尼克斯星系
敌对势力：当前存在武装不法分子
装备规格： <EM4>货运飞船</EM4> ，个人武器， <EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>
简报：
我们最新的情报显示，碎刃帮已经补充了他们的剜度尸体库存，并将很快将它们从他们正在运营的旧<EM4>QV 物流站</EM4>转移给一个感兴趣的买家。UEE 不希望再发生像 ASD 那样的事情，因此他们迫切希望我们<EM4>回收冷冻舱</EM4>并将它们交到<EM4>[DESTINATION]的货运电梯</EM4>。

虽然现场的碎刃帮成员可能会进行抵抗，但他们并非你任务的重点。必要时解决他们，然后拿到冷冻舱。

谨此致意，

迪肯·托宾
运营经理
互安防务

本通讯构成非约束性要约，接受后任一方均可立即终止而无需通知。所有行动均由承包商自行承担风险，并须遵守 UEE 及星系的法律。

InterSec_ResourceGathering_Tech_Desc.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: 
To prevent the Shattered Blade from flooding the black market with xeno-contraband, the UEE has charged InterSec with <EM4>recovering a stash of Vanduul Plating and Metal.</EM4> from the old <EM4>QV Logistics station</EM4> the gang has been occupying. Once you have the materials in your posession, deliver them to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Following from your previous experience, it would not be surprising if the Shattered Blade offer resistance, but ensure that your focus is on recovering the materials.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
InterSec_ResourceGathering_Tech_Desc.tr:
任务说明

行动区域：尼克斯星系
敌对势力：当前存在武装不法分子
装备规格：作战级飞船，个人武器
简报：
为了防止碎刃帮通过黑市贩卖外星违禁品，UEE 已委托互安防务<EM4>回收一批剜度装甲板和金属。</EM4>来自该帮派盘踞的地方旧<EM4>QV 物流站</EM4>。一旦你持有这些材料，将它们交付给<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的货运电梯。

根据你之前的经验，碎刃帮大概率会抵抗，确保你的重点是回收材料。

谨此致意，

迪肯·托宾
运营经理
互安防务

本通讯构成非约束性要约，接受后任一方均可立即终止而无需通知。所有行动均由承包商自行承担风险，并须遵守 UEE 及星系的法律。

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.en:
Hey,

Only looking for contractors who are the best of the best for this one. One of our most valued clients is expecting an incredibly important shipment which is now seriously overdue.

Here at Covalex, we pride ourselves on treating all of our clients equally, offering outstanding levels of service regardless of what we're delivering. That being said, if we lose this contract someone's gonna be in hot water and I really can't afford for that person to be me.

The tracker is reporting that the last contractor's ship is over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Don't take any chances with this one, you'll need a ship that can hold <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to collect it all.

Deliver the shipment to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we can put this whole mess behind us. And you'll make a sizeable heap of credits in the process. Not bad, right?

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.
Covalex_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.tr:
嘿，

这单活儿我只找最顶尖的承包商。我们最尊贵的客户之一正在等一批极其重要的货物，现在已经严重逾期了。

在科瓦莱什，我们以平等对待所有客户为荣，无论运送什么，都提供卓越水平的服务。话虽如此，如果我们丢了这个合同，肯定有人要有大麻烦，而我可承受不起那个人是我。

追踪器报告显示，上一位承包商的飞船停在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。这单千万别抱侥幸心理，你需要一艘能容纳<EM4>[MAX_SCU] 货物集装箱</EM4>的飞船，外加一把<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>才能把货都收齐。

把货物运到<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的货运电梯处，我们就能把这烂摊子抛在脑后了。而且在这个过程中你能赚到一大笔信用点。还不赖，对吧？

[SIGN_OFF]

艾拉·蒂埃诺 
初级物流协调员 
科瓦莱什货运   
“尽你所需，达你所在” 







科瓦莱什货运是一家有限责任公司。为了鼓励及时交付并防止运输中的欺诈行为，科瓦莱什货运将设定交货时间限制。一旦超过时限，任何未交付的货物将被视作被窃取。总付款将根据成功交付的货物比例支付。

CFP_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.en:
A Citizens for Prosperity ship has been ambushed by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and we need a skilled pilot to help them out.

We lost contact with them mid comms, but it sounded like they were taking heavy fire. It may be too late for them, but the vital supplies they were carrying could still be put to good use. Fly over there, take out any hostiles, and recover the shipment. You'll need a ship that can support <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the supplies onto your ship.

Take them to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I'll guarantee they'll be put to good use.

Be safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.tr:
一艘繁荣公民的飞船在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 遭到了一伙不法分子的伏击，我们需要一名技术精湛的飞行员前去支援。

我们在通讯中途与他们失去了联系，但听声音他们当时正遭受猛烈的攻击。现在去营救他们可能为时已晚，但他们运送的重要物资仍然能发挥巨大作用。飞往该地点，消灭所有敌对分子，并回收这批货物。你需要一艘能够装载 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 货物集装箱</EM4> 的飞船，并配备一把 <EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4> 以便将物资搬运到你的飞船上。

将货物运送至 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯处，我保证这些物资会得到妥善利用。

祝你一路平安，

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_ApolloSkin.en: Apollo very good ship. Would be much better if ship was red. Wikelo make all things possible. You trade for what I want and we have a deal.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_ApolloSkin.tr: 阿波罗是很好的飞船。如果飞船是红的就更好了。维克洛让所有东西都有可能。你给我交易我想要的，我们就成交。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_RedHunterArmor.en: Wikelo hear that Humans think red is the color of passion and anger. This armor good for both. You give me items on list and this red armor is yours.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_RedHunterArmor.tr: 维克洛听说人类觉得红色是激情和危险的颜色。这个护甲两边都合适。给我列表上的东西这套红色护甲就是你的了。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_GMNI_Shotgun.en: Shooting can be messy. Red Human Blood everywhere. Not a problem with this shotgun. Splashes blends right in! I give it to you if you give me everything I want on list. Good trade.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_GMNI_Shotgun.tr: 射击乱糟糟的。红色的人类血到处都是。有这个霰弹枪就没问题了。溅出来的血完全能融入！把列表上我要的东西都给我，我就把它给你。公平交易。

Foxwell_ShipAmbush_VH_desc_001.en:
Foxwell got word from an important client that outlaws have put together a squad that’s been stalking the system with sub-capital ships and escort fighters. Our client is concerned that if left unchecked, outlaws will create more of these attack squads and destabilize system security. We’ve been hired to wipe out this group before that happens. 

We need a confident and skilled contractor for this task. Good news is that we have a plan in place. One of the ships used by this squad, a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, was stolen from our client, who’s still able to track its movements. They’ve shared the location data with us and we’ve discovered that this squad often goes by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We’ve scouted the location and discovered a large emission cloud makes an ideal spot for an ambush.  

Not going to lie, this isn’t going to be easy. We don’t have any additional forces available to deploy, so it would be good to bring your own support. 

You manage to pull this off, I've arranged for a bonus payment of <EM4>12 MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_ShipAmbush_VH_desc_001.tr:
福克斯韦尔从一位重要客户那里得到消息，有位不法分子组建了一支舰队，用次旗舰和护航战斗机在星系中屡次发动袭击。我们的客户担心，如果任其发展下去，不法分子会组建更多这样的攻击小队，破坏全星系安全。我们受雇在事态发展至此之前消灭这群人。

我们需要一个信心十足、技术娴熟的承包商来完成这项任务。好消息是，我们已经有了一个计划。这支舰队中有一艘战舰是从我们的客户那里偷来的<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>，我们的客户还能追踪它的行踪。他们给我们共享了位置数据，发现这支小队经常出入<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。我们对该地点进行了侦查，发现一大片可以作为理想伏击地点的放射云。 

不瞒你说，这并不容易。我们没有额外的部队可以部署，所以最好自带支援。

完成这项任务后，我已经安排让主承包商拿到<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT]份雇佣兵公会凭证</EM4>以示奖励。

祝你好运，

凯文·沃尔顿
调度员，福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_01.en:
Something weird is going on at the old Hathor mining facilities. Both the platform alignment facilities and orbital laser platforms have been abandoned and gathering dust for decades, but outlaws have started using them as a base of operations.

We’ve been hired by a concerned party who’s recently lost a lot of important cargo to one such gang. Currently, their stuff is stashed at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4> and <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4>, but there’s a growing fear that the gang may be offloading their goods soon. That’s why we’ve been hired to hit both of those Hathor facilities, retrieve the cargo from the freight elevators, and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

Here’s the specifics on what to grab from each location. Doesn’t matter in what order you do this, as long as it all gets collected and delivered. Just be sure to bring a ship that can handle <EM4>32 SCU cargo containers</EM4>.  It also wouldn't hurt to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.   

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]

Foxwell hasn’t been able to scout these locations, but if I were you, I’d expect to face some serious armed resistance. Best bring a bunch of gear and some friends.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_01.tr:
哈索尔的废弃采矿设施发生了一些奇怪的事情。那里的平台对准设施和轨道激光平台都已废弃数十年，早已经盖满了灰尘，但不法分子却开始利用它们作为行动基地。

我们受雇于一个最近丢失了很多重要货物相关方的。目前，他们的货物被藏在<EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4>和<EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4>，但人们越来越担心，该团伙可能很快就会转移货物。这就是为什么我们受雇去袭击这两个哈索尔的设施，从货运电梯里取回货物，并把它们运到<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的货运电梯。

以下是每个地点需要取回的具体货物。顺序并不重要，只要能全部收集并送达即可。你只需确保携带一艘能装载 <EM4>[MAX_SCU]货物集装箱</EM4>的飞船即可。随身携带一把<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>也无妨。 

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

福克斯威尔尚未仔细侦查这些地点，但我预计你会遇到一些严重的武装抵抗。最好带上一堆装备和几位朋友。


马库斯·克伦
福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_bombingrun_S_desc_001.en:
We are looking for a highly competent mercenary team to assist with a challenging demolition for a VIP client.

The outlaws operating at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> has been identified as a threat of growing concern in the area and to help deal with this situation your team is being tasked with taking out the fuel tanks at the location. 

However, it won't be as easy as just slipping in and out - expect to deal with multiple hostiles and turrets that will be expecting you. The stronger your crew the better your chances at completing this operation successfully.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_bombingrun_S_desc_001.tr:
我们正在寻找一支极具实力的雇佣兵团队，协助一位 VIP 客户完成一项具有挑战性的破坏任务。

在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 活动的不法分子已被确认为该地区日益严重的威胁。为了协助解决这一局面，你的团队被委派摧毁该地点的燃料箱。

然而，这不会像溜进去再溜出来那么简单——预计要应对多名敌对分子和严阵以待的炮塔。你的队伍越强大，成功完成此次行动的机会就越大。

祝你好运，

凯文·沃尔顿
调度员，福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_bombingrun_VH_desc_001.en:
Foxwell have been hired by a client to take part in a multi-stage operation on a known outlaw base at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and need a strong pilot to play their part in this.

You, and whatever additional support ships you arrange, will be tasked with taking out the fuel tanks located there to set the stage for the rest of the operation to follow. 

Unfortunately, this place is swarming with ships and anti-air turrets. So make sure you and your people are ready, and remember, the fuel tanks are your priority. No need to be a hero.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_bombingrun_VH_desc_001.tr:
福克斯韦尔受客户委托，参与一项针对位于 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 的已知不法分子基地的多阶段行动，并需要一名强力的飞行员参与其中。

你以及你安排的任何额外支援飞船将负责摧毁那里的燃料箱，为后续行动奠定基础。

不幸的是，这个地方到处都是飞船和防空炮塔。所以确保你和你的人马都准备就绪，并且记住，燃料箱是你的首要任务。没必要去当什么孤胆英雄。

祝你好运，

凯文·沃尔顿
调度员，福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_VH_Desc_001.en:
A client needs our help. Outlaws are roaming certain sectors where they do business and attacking anyone they come across. Our client has already lost several ships and can’t afford to lose anymore. 

We need someone to patrol those areas and draw out any hostile forces. The job begins with you heading to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scanning. Then we’ll share a handful of other patrol points for you to scan. 

From the sound of it, these packs of ships feature skilled and aggressive pilots. Best be ready to rumble if you run into any of them. Would be good to have at least <EM4>two trusted pilots</EM4> by your side for this one.

At the end of a successful patrol, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>18 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Stay chilly,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_VH_Desc_001.tr:
一位客户需要我们的帮助。不法分子正在他们的业务区域内游荡，并攻击他们遇到的任何人。我们的客户已经损失了几艘飞船，无法承受更进一步的损失。

我们需要有人前往这些区域巡逻，引出那些敌对势力。任务开始后，你需要前往HUD上的<EM4>位置标记</EM4>并执行扫描。之后，我们会提供若干个额外的巡逻点，供你继续执行扫描任务。

根据情报，这些敌方舰队中的飞行员技术娴熟且极具攻击性。如果你遇到他们中的任何一个，务必准备迎战。建议至少携带<EM4>两位值得信赖的飞行员</EM4>同行执行本任务。

任务成功完成后，主承包商将额外获得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT]份雇佣兵公会凭证</EM4>作为奖励。

冷静应对。

凯文·沃尔顿
调度员，福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_HaulCargo_AToB_PAF_desc_01.en:
A crew recently raided a distribution center and made off with <EM4>[CARGOGRADETOKEN] load of cargo</EM4>. Foxwell has been hired to get all those goods back. We’re getting reports of these outlaws using old Hathor facilities as stash houses and we believe the stolen items are currently at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

If interested, you’ll need a ship that can handle <EM4>32 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. Doubt you’ll be able to slip in and out of that PAF without being noticed either, so best be prepared to clear the location. Once safe, grab the goods from the freight elevator and deliver them to the <EM4>freight elevator at [DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

It also wouldn't hurt to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.   

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_HaulCargo_AToB_PAF_desc_01.tr:
最近有一伙人突袭了一个配送中心，抢走了<EM4>[CARGO_GRADE]</EM4>。福克斯韦尔受雇来取回这些货物。我们收到报告称，这些不法分子利用废弃的哈索尔设施作为藏匿地点，我们确信，被盗物品目前在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。

如果有兴趣，你需要一艘能装载<EM4>[MAX_SCU]货物集装箱</EM4>的飞船。你可能不一定可以潜入那个轨道激光平台，所以最好做好清场的准备。安全后，从货运电梯中取出货物，送到位于<EM4>[DESTINATION]的货运电梯</EM4>。

随身携带一把<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>也无妨。


马库斯·克伦
福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_HaulCargo_AToB_OLP_desc_01.en:
Looking for a contractor with the right skills and ship for an important mission. Outlaws ambushed a Hull C carrying a <EM4>[CARGOGRADETOKEN]</EM4> load of cargo and took it to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We’ve been hired to get it all back.  

The cargo is being stored somewhere at a defunct Hathor facility. The place is big and crawling with outlaws. Need someone to retrieve the goods from the freight elevator there and deliver it all back to the <EM4>freight elevator at [DESTINATION]</EM4>. Don’t think this will be a walk in the park. Bring lots of ammo and a ship that can handle <EM4>32 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. 

It also wouldn't hurt to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you.   

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_HaulCargo_AToB_OLP_desc_01.tr:
我们正在寻找一名拥有合适技能和船只的承包商，以执行一项重要任务。歹徒伏击了一艘载有<EM4>[CARGO_GRADE]</EM4>货物的货轮 C，并将货物运往<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>。我们受雇去取回所有货物。 

货物被存放在哈索尔公司的一个废弃设施里，那个地方很大，到处都是逃犯。我们需要有人把货物从那里的货运电梯里取出来，然后全部运回位于<EM4>[DESTINATION]的货运电梯</EM4>。别掉以轻心，请务必带上大量弹药和一艘可以装载<EM4>[MAX_SCU]货物集装箱</EM4>的飞船。

随身携带一把<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>也无妨。


马库斯·克伦
福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_DefendLocation_VH_Desc_001.en:
Ship support is needed at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> immediately. Our client’s interests in the area are under fierce attack by outlaw forces. Looking for someone who can grab their gear, a few support ships they can trust, and deploy before it’s too late. Once you arrive, I’ll send any sitrep updates your way.  

Don’t mess this up. These clients are paying for and expecting top tier protection. If anything goes wrong, we could lose this contract. That’s why we’ll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>18 MG Scrip</EM4> if all goes down without a hitch.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DefendLocation_VH_Desc_001.tr:
需要立即前往<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>提供舰船支援。我们的客户在该区域的利益正遭遇非法武装的猛烈攻击。现在需要有人迅速整理装备，带上几艘可靠的支援舰船，在局势彻底失控前火速前往。当你抵达后，我会第一时间将现场战况更新发送给你。

别搞砸了。这些客户花了大价钱，指望我们提供顶级安保。如果出现任何纰漏，我们可能会失去这份合约。因此，若本次任务圆满完成，主承包商将额外获得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT]份雇佣兵公会凭证</EM4>作为奖励。

祝你好运。

凯文·沃尔顿
调度员，福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.en:
Need a battle-hardened pilot for an important patrol. A prominent client is fed up with outlaws targeting their ships and satellites. We’ve been hired to scan the areas in question and deal with any hostile forces. The patrol begins at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD before moving to a number of other locations we’ll expect you to clear.

Not sure what you’ll run into out there, but based on intel shared by the client, they’re frequently seeing fighter groups of five to seven ships roaming the region. Some even have larger ships leading the charge. That means you better be ready for a serious fight. If you can, try to recruit at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> to the cause. Even a seasoned pilot will need all the help they can get against this crew.   

Since this is going to be a tough one, the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>24 MG Scrip</EM4> at the end of the patrol.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.tr:
我们需要一名身经百战的飞行员进行一次重要巡逻。一个重要的客户对那些袭击他们飞船和卫星的歹徒已经忍无可忍了，我们受雇扫描相关区域并处理任何敌对势力。从你的HUD上<EM4>标记点</EM4>开始巡逻，然后前往其他地点，我们希望你能清除这些地点。

虽然不知道你会在那里遇到什么，但根据客户提供的情报，他们经常看到由五到七艘战斗机组成的舰队在该区域游荡，有些甚至有更大的战舰。这意味着你最好准备好打一场硬仗。如果可以，尽量招募至少<EM4>三个朋友</EM4>加入。即使是经验丰富的飞行员，在面对这群人时也会需要尽可能多的帮助。  

由于这将是一项艰巨的任务，主承包商将在巡逻结束时获得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT]份雇佣兵公会凭证</EM4>以示奖励。

祝你好运，

凯文·沃尔顿
调度员，福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

foxwell_DefendShip_H_desc_001.en:
An emergency contract just came in about a fight near [LOCATION]. Apparently a group of ships were ambushed by outlaws led by [TARGET], who's been wanted on multiple planets for murder and ship theft. Foxwell's looking for top tier combat pilots to go and protect the clients against them.

This one's been flagged as a red level contract so it's really dangerous. If you have people you could bring, you probably should. If you do, you should also let them know about Foxwell's hiring policies. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
foxwell_DefendShip_H_desc_001.tr:
一份紧急合同刚刚传来，地点在[LOCATION] 附近，似乎有一队飞船遭到由[TARGET] 领导的不法分子的伏击。此人因多次谋杀和飞船盗窃而在多个星球被通缉。福克斯韦尔正在寻找顶尖的战斗飞行员前去保护客户安全。

这次任务合同级别被标记为红色，危险性极高。如果你能带上其他人手，最好带上。如果带人参加，也别忘了向他们介绍一下福克斯韦尔的招聘政策。

马库斯·克伦
福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_DefendLocation_S_Desc_001.en:
Looking for a consummate professional to handle a high-stakes job. We’ve got VIP clients at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> who are facing extremely aggressive and motivated outlaws targeting ships around their location. Exact details on the attack are still rolling in, but it appears to be a wide ranging, multi-pronged operation. 

If you’re available, I highly recommend that you bring additional combat support ships, plenty of supplies, and your A-game. Get this right, and we’ll reward the main contractor with a bonus payment of <EM4>24 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DefendLocation_S_Desc_001.tr:
我们正在寻找一位精湛的专业人士来处理一项高风险的任务。我们在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>有一位VIP客户，他们正面临着极具侵略性且目的明确的不法分子，他们的目标是那个位置周围的所有飞船。有关攻击的确切细节仍在调查中，但这似乎是一次范围广泛、多管齐下的行动。

如果你打算加入我们，我强烈建议你带上额外的战斗支援飞船、充足的补给，并维持好最佳状态。如果你能完成这次任务，我们将奖励主承包商 <EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT]份雇佣兵公会凭证</EM4>作为奖金。

祝你好运，

凯文·沃尔顿
调度员，福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

Foxwell_ShipAmbush_S_desc_001.en:
We’ve received a handful of comms about recent attacks undertaken by an <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and its escort ships. After opening a file, we started tracking the ship’s movements and noticed that it frequently passes an emission cloud near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We want to use that to our advantage to launch a surprise attack. 

Once on site, you should hide in the emission cloud to cloak your signature enough to allow you to make the first strike. Unfortunately, Foxwell can’t provide additional reinforcements for this operation, so you’ll be responsible for bringing any support forces. You might need the help too. The crew of the [TARGET] is aggressive and battle hardened.        

You get this taken care of for us and there's a bonus payment of <EM4>16 MG Scrip</EM4> in it for the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_ShipAmbush_S_desc_001.tr:
我们最近收到了一些关于一艘<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>及其护航舰队发动攻击的通讯。打开文件后，我们开始追踪这艘飞船的行踪，发现它经常经过<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近的放射云。我们想利用这个优势发动突然袭击。

一旦你到达现场，就躲在放射云中，隐蔽自己的信号特征，以便能够先发制人。不幸的是，福克斯韦尔不能为这次行动提供额外的增援，所以支援部队需要你自己负责。你可能也需要帮助。[TARGET]的船员攻击性极高，而且各个身经百战。   

把这事办妥了，主要承包商就能拿到<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT]份雇佣兵公会凭证</EM4>以示奖励。

祝你好运，

凯文·沃尔顿
调度员，福克斯韦尔安保
“你的方式，你的安全”

福克斯韦尔安保是一家获得UEE全境执业许可的担保安全专家公司。我们一直在寻找新的干员加入我们的团队。如果您或您认识的人有兴趣，请联系我们的合同代表。

RedWind_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We’re having trouble completing a hauling mission and need a reliable contractor who has experience working in dangerous environments to complete the job. Just as a heads up, the cargo is in an abandoned ship surrounded by multiple, highly dangerous outlaws. We strongly advise you bring some backup with you and <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s goods. Details follow:

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Since this is a bit risky, we’re offering proportionate pay. I’ll leave it up to you to decide how to distribute it to your crew.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

我们正遭遇运输任务的困境，急需一位在危险环境中经验丰富的可靠承包商完成此项工作。需提前提醒：货物位于一艘废弃船只内，周围盘踞着多名极度危险的亡命之徒。强烈建议您携带支援部队及<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>前往回收客户货物。详情如下：

打捞地点
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

交付地点
     · <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>处的货运电梯

鉴于任务风险较高，我们将提供相应报酬。具体如何分配给团队成员，由你自行决定。

以工作为荣——即便作为承包商，你亦代表着红风物流公司的形象。切勿故意做出损害公司声誉的行为。

RedWind_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descriptio.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Putting out a call for a highly skilled pilot who can recover our client’s cargo. Please only accept this contract if you have experience dealing with extremely hostile situations involving multiple combatants. Additional crew members and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> are highly recommended.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

The cargo should be in the bay of the abandoned ship. The client has already expressed frustration regarding the cargo’s delay so please work quickly and efficiently.

BE RESILIENT – Life is hard and sometimes you have to roll with the punches. Keep going and don’t let it bring you down.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descriptio.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

现招募技术精湛的飞行员执行客户货物回收任务。仅限具备应对多方交战极端险境经验者接单。强烈建议配备额外船员及<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>。

打捞地点
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

交付地点
     · <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>处的货运电梯

货物应存放于废弃船舱内。委托方已对货物延误表示不满，请务必高效作业。

保持韧性——人生不易，有时必须学会顺势而为。继续前进，莫让挫折击垮你。

RedWind_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

One of our haulers ran into some engine trouble whilst transporting some cargo for us and was forced to abandon their ship. Looking for a contractor who can recover the cargo and complete the delivery. You’ll need to bring your own <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to transport the cargo to your ship. Details below.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Be advised, the recovery location hasn’t been verified as safe. You might find an opportunistic outlaw trying to take the cargo for themselves, so be on alert.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

我们的一艘运输船在运送货物途中遭遇引擎故障，被迫弃船。现招募承包商回收货物并完成交付。需自备<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>将货物运至您的船只。详情如下：

打捞地点
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

交付地点
     · <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>处的货运电梯

请注意：回收地点安全状况尚未确认。可能存在非法分子伺机而动企图劫取货物，务必保持警惕。

以工作为荣——即便作为承包商，你亦代表着红风物流公司的形象。切勿故意做出损害公司声誉的行为。

RedWind_HaulCargo_desc_intro.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is looking to bolster our roster of haulers. Need someone who can keep their wits about them and keep quiet. If you check those boxes, and have a ship that can handle <EM4>4 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, then give this trial run a shot.  

PICK UP
Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

DROP OFF
Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Complete this contract and we’ll send more hauling opportunities your way. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.
RedWind_HaulCargo_desc_intro.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

红风物流正在寻找更多货运员。我们需要一个能保持理智并且不会惹是生非的人。如果你符合这些条件，并且有一艘可以处理<EM4>[MAX_SCU]货物集装箱</EM4>的飞船，那么就来试试吧。

取货
<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>的货运电梯

卸货
<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的货运电梯。

完成本合约，我们将为你提供更多运输机会。还有，别忘了带上一把<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>。

RedWind_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We have a special assignment for only the most competent contractors. One of our haulers who is sadly no longer with us failed to complete their last job. The cargo they were supposed to deliver is sitting stationary in their former ship in the location listed below.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

I’m not going dance around the issue, this is an extremely challenging job. You’ll need to bring a strong team of skilled pilots with you to deal with the outlaws that killed the previous contractor and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to retrieve the client’s cargo. That said, if you take on this contract, we will make it worth your time.

HOW DID WE DO – Complete our short feedback survey on our Spectrum page for a chance to enter our monthly prize draw.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_Super_Description.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

我们的一艘运输船在运送货物途中遭遇引擎故障，被迫弃船。现招募承包商回收货物并完成交付。需自备<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>将货物运至您的船只。详情如下：

打捞地点
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

交付地点
     · <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>处的货运电梯

请注意：回收地点安全状况尚未确认。可能存在非法分子伺机而动企图劫取货物，务必保持警惕。

我们的表现如何？——请在光谱页面完成简短反馈调查，即有机会参与每月抽奖活动。

RedWind_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

A Red Wind hauler has been ambushed by some outlaws and now our clients’ cargo is sitting still whilst they prepare to steal it. We need a pilot with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a combat ready ship to head to the location below and recover the cargo before it’s gone for good.

RECOVERY LOCATION
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

The pilot reported multiple hostiles so make sure you take this seriously. 

EVERY OPPORTUNITY COUNTS – Make the most of what’s given to you, show us that you can handle more work.
RedWind_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

一艘红风的运输船遭不法分子伏击，客户货物现处于静止状态，不法分子们正准备窃取货物。我们需要一名配备<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>且战备状态良好的飞行员，前往下方指定地点抢救货物，以免货物永久丢失。

打捞地点
     · <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>

交付地点
     · <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>处的货运电梯

飞行员报告遭遇多名敌对分子，请务必严肃对待此次任务。

每个机会都弥足珍贵——充分利用现有资源，向我们证明你能够胜任更多工作。

cfp_bombingrun_sabotage_generators_desc_.en:
There is a group of outlaws at [LOCATION] that have become increasingly brazen in their attacks on Citizens for Prosperity assets in the system. 

To minimize loss of life, we want to first try convincing them to move on to somewhere else by disabling their generators and destroying their fuel reserves. 

Hopefully, that should be enough to convince them to move on to greener pastures.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_bombingrun_sabotage_generators_desc_.tr:
在[LOCATION]有一群不法分子，他们最近开始越来越肆无忌惮地攻击星系中的繁荣公民组织的资产。

为了最大限度地减少人员伤亡，我们希望首先通过瘫痪他们的发电机和摧毁他们的燃料储备来说服他们转移到其他地方。

希望这足以说服他们转移到更安全的地方。

谢谢，

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

Highpoint_KillAnimal_OneType_desc.en:
We’ve been monitoring a situation at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> regarding an uptick in the <EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4> population over the past few months. Our models indicate that if this continues many of the native plants and animals will be adversely affected. It’s imperative that the <EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4> population is reduced before that happens.     

If you can help, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for more specifics on the targeted creature.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists
Highpoint_KillAnimal_OneType_desc.tr:
我们一直在监测<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>的情况，在过去几个月里，<EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4>的数量有所增加。我们的模型显示，如果这种情况持续下去，许多本地动植物都将受到不利影响。当务之急是在那种事情发生之前降低<EM4>[CREATURE]</EM4>的数量。    

如果你能提供帮助，请参阅日志中的 <EM4>“斯坦顿野生动物指南”</EM4>，了解目标生物的更多详细信息。

致最好的祝愿，

万达·韦克海泽
合约管理员
高境荒野专家公司

Highpoint_KillAnimals_rockcracker_desc_E.en:
If you have any work that's going to be bringing you to one of those old QV Breaker Stations in the Keeger Belt, we have something else that we could use your help on while you're there.
 
We've recently been contacted by the People's Alliance to assist with an initiative to help prepare these abandoned stations for repairs. Unfortunately, a Valakkar infestation is creating serious problems for not only the stations' infrastructure, but also for the chances of them being brought back online one day. Due to Valakkar's status as an invasive species, we have decided that culling them is the only viable option.
 
Reduce the Valakkar numbers at any of the old QV Breaker Stations and we will offer you payment.
 
Best,
 
Wanda Werkheiser

Contract Manager

Highpoint Wilderness Specialists
Highpoint_KillAnimals_rockcracker_desc_E.tr:
如果你有任何工作需要前往基格小行星带的那些旧QV碎岩站，那么当你在那边的时候，我们还有一件事需要你的帮助。

人民联盟最近联系了我们，希望我们协助一项旨在为修复这些废弃空间站做准备的计划。不幸的是，瓦拉卡蠕虫的泛滥不仅给空间站的基础设施造成了严重破坏，也严重影响了它们有朝一日重新上线的可能性。由于瓦拉卡蠕虫属于入侵物种，我们认定将其扑杀是唯一可行的方案。

减少任何旧QV碎岩站内的瓦拉卡蠕虫数量，我们就会向你支付报酬。

致最好的祝愿，

万达·韦克海泽

合约管理员

高境荒野专家公司

CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_M_.en:
It feels that whenever we start to make real progress in the system, the outlaws are there to push one step back. We had recently cleared out [LOCATION] only to learn that a new outlaw gang has taken root there, using it as a launching point for various criminal enterprises. 

Since we can't afford to let this rot spread, you and a few support ships are being charged with heading there to clear out all the gang's packs. After you deal with one pack, be sure to wait until all of the hostile packs have been dealt with.

Know that you are helping to make a real difference,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_M_.tr:
感觉每当我们在该星系取得实质性进展时，那些不法分子总会跳出来让我们倒退一步。我们最近才刚刚清理了 [LOCATION]，却得知一个新的犯罪团伙又在那里扎根，并将其作为开展各种犯罪活动的跳板。

我们绝不能让这种事蔓延，你和几艘支援飞船将被派往该地，清剿该团伙的所有小队。在处理完一个小队后，请务必留在原地等待，直到所有敌对小队都被消灭。

请记住，你正在帮助我们做出真正的改变，
利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

EckhartSecurity_Defend_H_Desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

There’s a serious problem brewing for one of our clients at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They’ve been warned that a highly skilled outlaw crew has their sights set on overrunning and occupying that location. We’ve been hired to make sure that doesn’t happen. 

Need a contractor to deploy to the location immediately. Based on the intel provided by the client, this won’t be a walk in the park. We strongly advise you to bring allies and plenty of supplies to help ward of the impending attack.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_Defend_H_Desc_001.tr:
埃克哈特安保 有限责任公司 .
合约&派遣

合约类型：保卫地点
授权代码：= [APPROVAL_CODE]

需要立即处理

我们在<EM4> [LOCATION] </EM4>的一位客户正面临严重问题。他们收到警告，一伙技艺高超的不法之徒正准备占领该地点。我们受雇来确保这种情况不会发生。

需要一名承包商立即部署到该位置。根据客户提供的情报，这不会是轻而易举的事。我们强烈建议您带上盟友和大量物资来帮助抵御即将发生的袭击。

报酬将于合约成功完成后发放。

本合约不允许协商。

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的/或私人信息。此资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_H_desc_001.en:
A squad of ships recently shanked one of our convoys, and ten credits says they’re gonna try and do it again. Looking for someone to launch a reprisal attack before that can happen.  

We’ve ID’d the idiots as consisting of several large craft and a sizable escort. We believe the leader is flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and set that ship as the primary target. Since it’s a sizable and aggressive squad, a surprise attack seems like a smart play. They often pass by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, which has an emission cloud to hide in. Be smart and patient then strike when the time is right. 

Unless you fancy yourself a real ace, it’s probably best to bring some friends. Maybe you can entice folks by letting them know they can pick through the wreckage for valuables once the deed is done.

And on top of that, I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>8 Council Scrip</EM4> to sweeten the pot.

Stows out.
HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_H_desc_001.tr:
最近有一队飞船袭击了我们的一支船队，我赌十个信用点，他们绝对会再来一次。我希望有人能在这之前发动报复性攻击。 

我们已经确认了这些白痴的身份，他们由几艘大型飞船和一支规模不小的护卫队组成。我们认为他们的头驾驶的是<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>，并将该飞船设为我们的主要目标。由于这是一支规模庞大、咄咄逼人的小队，发动突袭才是明智之举。他们通常会经过<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>，那里有一片可以躲起来的放射云。保持智慧和耐心，然后在时机成熟时发动攻击。

除非你认为自己是真正的王牌，否则最好还是带几个朋友。也许你可以告诉他们，一旦完成任务，他们就可以在残骸中寻找值钱的东西，以此来吸引他们。

除此之外，我还将向主承包商额外发放<EM4> [SCRIPAMOUNT]份堂会凭证</EM4>，以示奖励。

斯托斯通讯完毕。

headhunters_eliminateall_outpost_desc_01.en:
Some assholes are refusing to pay us what we’re owed. Problem is, these idiots are bragging about it. Had they kept it quiet, we could’ve taken care of this more surgically, but now we need to send a message.

The fools are operating from [LOCATION]. We need them all gone. Make it as loud as you can. We’ll send your payment once everyone’s taken care of.

- Stows out.
headhunters_eliminateall_outpost_desc_01.tr:
有些混蛋拒绝支付我们应得的报酬。问题是，这些蠢货还到处炫耀。如果他们保持沉默，我们还能更彻底地解决这个问题，但现在我们需要向他们传达一个信息。

这些蠢货在[LOCATION]。我们需要他们全部消失，动静越大越好。等你把所有人都处理好了，我们会把你的报酬发过去。

-斯托斯通讯完毕。

EckhartSecurity_EliminateAll_storm_shut_.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Clear Location
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got an emergency request from Associated Science & Development for any available operators to report to [LOCATION] and deal with some hostiles who have overtaken one of their facilities. 

Once on site, you will need to engage and eliminate any hostile elements. ASD has indicated that this facility provides shuttle services to one of their embedded research centers but were very clear that you are not authorized to travel there. Trespassers will be shot and you will be no exception, so stick to the prescribed AO.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.
EckhartSecurity_EliminateAll_storm_shut_.tr:
埃克哈特安保有限公司
合约&派遣

合约类型：区域肃清
授权代码：[APPROVAL_CODE]

即时任务

接联合科学与开发公司发来紧急求援，现召集所有待命人员前往[LOCATION]报道，清除占领其设施的敌对目标。

抵达地点后，你需要接敌并歼灭所有敌对单位。联科发表示，该设施提供前往其附属研究中心的穿梭机运输服务，但明确表示你无权前往。擅闯者将被枪杀，你也不例外，因此请遵守规定的行动区域。

本合约不允许协商

此消息中可能包含机密、专有、特许保密的/或私人信息，该等资料仅供上述指定的个人或实体使用。

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti.en:
Hi,

Got a relatively straightforward one for you if you're interested.

One of our pilot ignored a maintenance warning and sure enough, a couple of hours later their ship broke down over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They're on their way back to the office now but we could do with a reliable hauler whose got a ship big enough to transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> to complete the haul for us.

Think you could help us out? You just need to pick up the stranded shipment and deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.  And I probably don't have to say this, but a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> would probably be handy to have along.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.
LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti.tr:
你好，

如果你感兴趣的话，我这有个相对简单的活儿。

我们的一名飞行员无视了维修警告，果不其然，几个小时后他们的飞船在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 抛锚了。他们现在正在回公司的路上，但我们需要一位拥有能装载 <EM4>[MAX_SCU] 大小的货柜</EM4> 的飞船的可靠运输员来替我们完成这趟运输。

觉得你能帮我们一把吗？你只需提取这批滞留的货物，并将其运送至 <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> 的货运电梯。这可能不用我多说，但带上 <EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4> 可能会很方便。

感谢合作，
雷耶斯·玲
货运物流协调员
玲家快递







玲家快递深知宇宙充满危险与变数，特制定多重保障机制守护你与货主的货物安全。为避免你因不可控因素受罚，总酬金将按成功交付货物的比例折算。每趟运输均设有交付时限。到期后仍未送达的货物将被标记为失窃并按此处理。所有提货与送货操作必须采用自动装载或通过货运电梯完成。

cfp_defendship_multi_VHRT_desc_001.en:
A Citizens for Prosperity convoy on a resupply run dropped a distress beacon near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They’re not answering any comms, so I assume the situation is serious. That convoy has some skilled pilots, so if they’re not responding then they definitely need the help.

We’ll compensate you to support that convoy.  

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_defendship_multi_VHRT_desc_001.tr:
一支繁荣公民的运输队在补给任务中在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>附近发布了求救信标。他们没有回应任何通讯，所以我推测情况很严重。那支运输队有一些技术娴熟的飞行员，所以如果他们没有回应，那么他们肯定需要帮助。

我们会支付您一定的报酬以支援这支运输队。

利马·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

Headhunters_DefendLocation_S_Desc_001.en:
Our crew at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> needs help. Enemy ships are swarming the area and attacking anything and everything they can find. That’d be bad enough as is, but this site has some absolutely crucial gear and personnel that we can’t have destroyed or compromised. 

Considering the size and scale of the attack, you’re gonna need a fully supplied ship and some reliable wingmen. Gather your crew, fly out to the site, and I’ll send you specifics on where you’re needed most.

To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn a bonus <EM4>24 Council Scrip</EM4> for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong.

- Stow
Headhunters_DefendLocation_S_Desc_001.tr:
我们在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>的船员急需支援。敌方飞船正大规模涌入该区域并攻击一切他们能找到的目标。光是这样已经够糟了，更别说该地点还部署了极其关键的设备和人员，绝不能被摧毁或破坏。

考虑到这次袭击的规模和强度，你需要一艘补给充足的飞船以及可靠的僚机。召集你的船员，飞往目标区域，我会在你抵达后发送详细任务指示，告知你最需要支援的地方。

为了表明我们对此任务的重视，主承包商将额外获得<EM4>[SCRIPAMOUNT]份堂会凭证</EM4>作为奖励，但需保证任务万无一失。

- 斯托斯

cfp_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_H_.en:
Citizens for Prosperity is looking for any available security operatives to retake several former CFP installations near [LOCATION] from Headhunter control. These clusters were violently taken from us by [TARGET] and resulted in the deaths of many volunteers.

Bringing these outposts back under our control will help provide more stability to the system. Reports indicate that [TARGET] tends to hide behind their rank and file, so they will likely appear once you've cleared out most of the hostiles.

XenoThreat are trained and motivated so they will not give up easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
cfp_ChainElimAll_2C_ElimSpec_HHAttack_H_.tr:
繁荣公民组织正在寻找任何空闲的安全人员，以便从猎头帮的控制下夺回[LOCATION]附近的几个之前由繁荣公民组织控制的设施。这些建筑群被[TARGET]暴力夺走，导致了许多志愿者的死亡。

为了提高星系的稳定性，我们需要重新掌控这些前哨站。报告显示，[TARGET]喜欢躲在他的小弟后面，所以一旦你们清除了大部分敌人，他才会现身。

异种威胁组织训练有素，而且行动十分积极，他们不会就此轻易放弃。

利玛·恩迪科特
首席调度员
繁荣公民

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti.en:
You got a ship and <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4>? Good. I’ve got work for you.

Don’t know how they knew we were coming, but one of my haulers got jumped over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The pilot’s gone silent so I assume they’ve been ghosted, but the cargo tracker is stationary for now.

Expect the bastards who took out my pilot to still be around, so bring backup. Get the cargo and get out, don’t need to risk anymore good haulers on this mess.

Get the goods to the freight elevator to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll send your payment.

-Twitch
DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descripti.tr:
你有飞船和<EM4>重型牵引光束</EM4>？好。我有个活儿要你干。

不知他们怎么知道我们要来，但我的运输船在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>被伏击了。飞行员失联了，估计被干掉了，不过货运追踪器现在显示它们处于静止状态。

劫走我飞行员的混蛋们应该还在附近，带上支援。拿到货物立刻撤离，没必要在这烂摊子上再损失一名优秀的运货员。

把货物运到货运电梯送往<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>，我会转账报酬。

-“刺痛”

Kaboos_Mission_Description.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec needs your services once again.

The intel you previously gathered has been invaluable in identifying several prominent buyers of the illegally-obtained Vanduul parts. However, since then the Shattered Blade have continued their operations and the UEE is requesting that we <EM4>update our intel.</EM4>

We believe more information can be retrieved from the storage facilities located at the old <EM4>QV Logistics station.</EM4>

The operation parameters haven’t changed since your last mission: find the <EM4>encrypted data</EM4> and use the <EM4>decryption key</EM4> to decipher and upload the list to us. The Shattered Blade will have reinforced the area since the last time, so expect resistance.

Good luck. We’ll be in touch.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.
Kaboos_Mission_Description.tr:
任务说明

行动区域：尼克斯星系
敌对势力：武装的不法分子
装备规格：作战级飞船，个人武装
任务简报： 互安防务再次需要您的协助。

你先前收集的情报对锁定数名非法获取的剜度零件主要买家具有不可估量的价值。然而碎刃帮此后仍在持续运作，UEE 政府要求我们<EM4>更新情报</EM4>。

我们认为，位于旧<EM4>QV 物流站</EM4>的仓储设施中尚存可挖掘的情报资源。

行动内容与上次任务相同：搜寻<EM4>加密数据</EM4>，使用<EM4>破解密钥</EM4>破译后将清单上传。碎刃帮已对该区域加强防卫，请做好遭遇抵抗的准备。

祝你好运，我们将保持联络。


谨此致意，

迪肯·托宾
运营经理
互安防务

本通讯构成非约束性要约，接受后任一方均可立即终止而无需通知。所有行动均由承包商自行承担风险，并须遵守 UEE 及星系的法律。

RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_ToPyro_Dange.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Have a run here that could become a lucrative regular thing if we can pull it off.  This’ll take you into Pyro, so you’ll have to be ready to tangle with some of the locals. 

You’ll need to grab the stuff from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, make the jump to Pyro, and then get to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

All you need to do is bring a ship with space for <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and be ready to do some damage if someone picks a fight with you.
RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_ToPyro_Dange.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

我这有个活儿，要是你能搞定，说不定能变成个赚钱的好差事。任务会带你深入派罗，你得做好和当地人干架的准备。

你需要从<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>处取货，跳跃至派罗，再前往<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

你只需要准备一艘能容纳<EM4>[MAX_SCU]大小的货柜</EM4>的飞船、配备<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>，并做好战斗准备——如果有人挑衅，你得能还手。

RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_FromPyro_Dan.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Guess some companies see danger when offered a run in Pyro. We see profits. Got one here that starts in the system at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and then goes to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.  

The client warned us that outlaws in Pyro regularly target this run, which has scared other hauling concerns. Be sure your ship is all geared up and can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. And don't forget to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.
RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_FromPyro_Dan.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

看来有些公司觉得在派罗星系跑运输是冒险。我们却看到了利润。这里有个任务起点在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>星系，终点是<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。 

客户提醒我们，派罗星域的不法分子常袭击这条航线，这已吓退了其他运输公司。请确保您的飞船装备齐全，能承载<EM4>[MAX_SCU]大小的货运集装箱</EM4>。别忘了携带<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>。

RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_LuxuryGoods_.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a contract from a major client who needs a skilled pilot to move a large load of luxury items from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

You'll need room for at least <EM4>8 SCU cargo containers</EM4> in your hold. You'll also need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded. 

And as a fair warning, the things you'll be carrying are pricey enough that you might attract some unwanted attention. <EM4>Be ready to defend yourself</EM4> if you can't evade.
RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_LuxuryGoods_.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

我们接到重要客户的委托，需要一名技术娴熟的飞行员将大批奢侈品从<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>运往<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

货舱需至少容纳<EM4>[MAX_SCU]大小的货运集装箱</EM4>。你还需要配备<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>以完成所有装卸作业。 

另外，郑重提醒，这批所运的货物价值不菲，很可能招致不速之客的觊觎。如果无法规避追踪，<EM4>务必做好自卫准备</EM4>。

RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_Rev.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind needs an experienced pilot to transport a large shipment of raw revenant tree pollen from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

This might seems self-evident, but the rep from CFP asked us to assure you that it's okay under UEE law to transport revenant tree pollen as long as it hasn't been processed. 

Be sure that your ship can carry up to <EM4>16 SCU cargo containers</EM4> before you accept the contract. And buy a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> if you don't have one already to make loading and unloading as painless as possible.
RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_Rev.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

红风号需要一名经验丰富的飞行员，将大批亡魂树花粉从<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>运往以下地点：

交付地点（任意顺序）

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

此项要求或许显而易见，但繁荣公民代表特意嘱咐我们确认：根据 UEE 法律，只要亡灵树花粉未经加工，均可合法运输。

接受合约前请确认你的飞船可承载至少<EM4>[MAX_SCU]大小的货运集装箱</EM4>。若尚未配备<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>，请务必购置以实现最便捷的装卸操作。

RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_ToC.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

CFP has an urgent request for a pilot with combat experience. A few of their settlements are under immediate threat and may soon be under attack, so they need supplies ASAP. 

If you're confident that you can navigate a potential combat zone, please head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, grab the cargo, and bring it to these locations:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

You'll need enough room for <EM4>16 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, and your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded and unloaded.

Keep in mind that it's always best to run if someone tries to ambush you. But if you get cornered, don't hesitate to defend yourself.
RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_ToC.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

繁荣公民正在紧急征召具备实战经验的飞行员。其部分据点正面临迫在眉睫的威胁，可能即将遭受攻击，亟需物资支援。

若你有信心穿越潜在交战区，请前往<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>领取货物，并运送至以下地点：

交付地点（顺序不限）

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

你需确保拥有足够空间容纳<EM4>[MAX_SCU]大小的货运集装箱</EM4>，并自备<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>以完成装卸作业。

谨记：如果遭遇伏击，逃跑永远是最佳选择。但若被逼入绝境，请毫不犹豫地进行自卫。

RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_Ran.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a request from a farmer in Pyro for specialized agricultural supplies - namely, ranta dung. Apparently, normal fertilizers aren't cutting it. They've put in orders from multiple distributors and need someone to bring everything back to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Here are all the places you can collect the dung:

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

 [MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

The client says your ship needs to be able to carry at least <EM4>8 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. Don't forget to bring your own <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading.
RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_Ran.tr:
红风物流
'您的货物，有我保障'
----------------------------

收到来自派罗某个农户的特殊农业物资请求——具体是兰塔有机粪便。据称，普通肥料效果不佳。他已向多家经销商下单，需要有人将所有物资运回<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>。

以下是可收集分辨的地点：

取货地点（顺序不限）

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]

客户要求你的飞船至少能承载<EM4>[MAX_SCU]大小的货运集装箱</EM4>。别忘了自备<EM4>手持牵引光束</EM4>用于装卸货物。

TheCollector_Ships_Meteor_Desc.en: Meteor big. It heavy. Have many guns. But Wikelo figure out way to make even better. You have things I will take to do.\n\nThat is all.
TheCollector_Ships_Meteor_Desc.tr: 流星很大。很重。有很多枪。但维克洛发现了让它更好的办法。你带东西，我会做。\n\n就是这样。

roughready_salvage_M_desc_001.en:
Got word there’s a few ships near [LOCATION] just floating all by their lonesome. It’s good salvage, but none of our crews have the time right now. We figured to give you first snap at it.

If you want the coords, we’ll sell them to you for a price. Then you’re free to pick the wreck as clean as you like and sell it all for a tidy profit. Now, you might run into some trouble out there from rival scavs, but I’m sure it won’t be anything you can’t handle.

- Smokey
roughready_salvage_M_desc_001.tr:
听说在 [LOCATION]附近有几艘船孤零零地漂着。这本是很好的打捞目标，但我们的船员现在都没有时间。我们打算让你先打捞它们。

如果你想要坐标，我们可以作价卖给你。然后你就可以随心所欲地把残骸拾掇干净，然后卖掉赚个盆满钵满。不过，你可能会遇到一些来自敌对打捞者的麻烦，但我相信你应付得了

- “烟雾”

Adagio_Industrial_Component_Salvage_Levs.en:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>.  

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points, maybe in one of Nyx's asteroid belts, or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. We advise extra caution since there have been Vanduul sightings in the system, especially with how long it might take for you to track down this specific order.  

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
Adagio_Industrial_Component_Salvage_Levs.tr:
阿德吉奥集团
一家自豪的平等机会雇主

关于本职位
为满足近期一笔特殊订单的需求，我们正在寻找承包商协助采集再生复合材料 (RMC)、未加工的建筑材料（碎石、碎片或残骸），以及通过拆解和分解废弃飞船获取的零部件，使用<EM4>牵引光束</EM4>手动移除所需部件。

我们建议在拉格朗日点搜寻残骸，也可以前往尼克斯星系的某个小行星带，或者通过合同管理器从我们这里购买打捞许可。由于该星系近期有剜度出没的报告，我们建议格外谨慎，尤其考虑到追踪这份特定订单可能需要较长时间。

获取材料后，请将其运送至位于<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的货运电梯

如需打捞建议，请查阅mobiGlas日志中的<EM4>《打捞者材料收集指南》</EM4>。

>任务要求<
 - 任意分类/尺寸的打捞飞船
 - 手持式牵引光束

 >免责声明<
承包商有责任确保其收集材料的载具符合地球联合帝国相关法律中关于合法打捞的规定。阿德吉奥集团对承包商所犯的任何罪行或轻罪概不负责，亦不对受这些行为影响的任何人提供赔偿或补偿。

Adagio_Industrial_Component_Salvage_Pyro.en:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. This request probably won't be as easy to satisfy as our normal contracts, partly in thanks to how many outlaws are flying around in Pyro and partly because this request isn't for your average everyday component. But lucky for you, the extra effort will be rewarded.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

     - A handheld tractor beam

Adagio_Industrial_Component_Salvage_Pyro.tr:
阿德吉奥集团
引以为豪的平等机会雇主

> 关于该工作 <
为了帮助满足最近的一份特殊订单，我们正在寻找承包商，通过剥离和粉碎废弃船只，协助获取再生复合材料（RMC）、未精炼的建筑材料(碎料, 碎片或废料)和组件；使用<EM4>牵引光束</EM4>手动移除所需部件。

我们建议在拉格朗日点搜寻残骸，或者您也可以在您的合同管理器中向我们购买打捞权。这项任务可能不像我们通常的合约那样容易完成，部分原因是由于派罗星系中有很多不法分子在四处活动，另外一部分原因是这项任务需要的并非普通的日常组件。但幸运的是，您的额外努力将会得到回报。

获得材料后，请将其运送到位于<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的货运电梯。

有关打捞的建议，请在你的mobiGlas日志中查阅 <EM4>斯坦顿采集者指南</EM4>。

> 要求 <
      - 任意等级/尺寸的打捞舰船
      - 手持式牵引光束

> 免责声明 <
承包商有责任确保其所收集的材料来源于根据现行 UEE 法律被认定为合法打捞的载具。阿德吉奥集团对承包商所实施的任何犯罪或轻罪行为不承担任何责任，亦不会就这些行为对任何受影响人员提供补偿或赔偿。

关于本职位
[DESTINATION] 为满足近期一笔特殊订单的需求，我们正在寻找承包商协助采集回收材料复合物 (RMC)、未加工的建筑材料（碎石、碎片或残骸），以及通过拆解和分解废弃飞船获取的零部件，使用<EM4>牵引光束</EM4>手动移除所需部件。

我们建议在拉格朗日点搜寻残骸，也可以前往尼克斯星系的某个小行星带，或者通过合约管理器从我们这里购买打捞许可。由于该星系近期有剜度出没的报告，我们建议格外谨慎，尤其考虑到追踪这份特定订单可能需要较长时间。

获取材料后，请将其运送至位于<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的货运电梯。

如需打捞建议，请查阅mobiGlas日志中的<EM4>《打捞者材料收集指南》</EM4>。

>任务要求<
- 任意分类/尺寸的打捞飞船
- 手持式牵引光束

>免责声明<
承包商有责任确保其收集材料的载具符合地球联合帝国相关法律中关于合法打捞的规定。阿德吉奥集团对承包商所犯的任何罪行或轻罪概不负责，亦不对受这些行为影响的任何人提供赔偿或补偿。

Adagio_Industrial_Component_Salvage_Pyro.en:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent special order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC), unrefined Construction Materials (Rubble, Pieces, or Salvage), and components by stripping and fracturing abandoned ships; removing the requested parts by hand with a <EM4>tractor beam</EM4>. 

We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager. This request probably won't be as easy to satisfy as our normal contracts, partly in thanks to how many outlaws are flying around in Pyro and partly because this request isn't for your average everyday component. But lucky for you, the extra effort will be rewarded.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship
     - A handheld tractor beam

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
Adagio_Industrial_Component_Salvage_Pyro.tr:
阿德吉奥集团
引以为豪的平等机会雇主

> 关于该工作 <
为了帮助满足最近的一份特殊订单，我们正在寻找承包商，通过剥离和粉碎废弃船只，协助获取再生复合材料（RMC）、未精炼的建筑材料(碎料, 碎片或废料)和组件；使用<EM4>牵引光束</EM4>手动移除所需部件。

我们建议在拉格朗日点搜寻残骸，或者您也可以在您的合同管理器中向我们购买打捞权。这项任务可能不像我们通常的合约那样容易完成，部分原因是由于派罗星系中有很多不法分子在四处活动，另外一部分原因是这项任务需要的并非普通的日常组件。但幸运的是，您的额外努力将会得到回报。

获得材料后，请将其运送到位于<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的货运电梯。

有关打捞的建议，请在你的mobiGlas日志中查阅 <EM4>斯坦顿采集者指南</EM4>。

> 要求 <
      - 任意等级/尺寸的打捞舰船
      - 手持式牵引光束

> 免责声明 <
承包商有责任确保其所收集的材料来源于根据现行 UEE 法律被认定为合法打捞的载具。阿德吉奥集团对承包商所实施的任何犯罪或轻罪行为不承担任何责任，亦不会就这些行为对任何受影响人员提供补偿或赔偿。

为了帮助满足最近的一份小规模订单，我们正在寻找承包商，通过剥离和粉碎废弃船只来协助获取再生复合材料（RMC）和建筑材料。我们建议在拉格朗日点搜寻残骸，或者您也可以在您的合同管理器中向我们购买打捞权

获得材料后，请将其运送到位于<EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>的货运电梯。

有关打捞的建议，请在你的mobiGlas日志中查阅 <EM4>斯坦顿采集者指南</EM4>。

> 要求 <
      - 任意等级/尺寸的打捞舰船

> 免责声明 <
承包商有责任确保其所收集的材料来源于根据现行 UEE 法律被认定为合法打捞的载具。阿德吉奥集团对承包商所实施的任何犯罪或轻罪行为不承担任何责任，亦不会就这些行为对任何受影响人员提供补偿或赔偿。

Adagio_Industrial_Salvage_Universal_E_De.en:
Adagio Holdings
A Proud Equal Opportunity Employer

> About the job <
To help satisfy a recent small-scale order, we are seeking contractors to help source Recycled Material Composite (RMC) by  stripping abandoned ships. We recommend searching for wreckage at Lagrange points or you could purchase a salvage claim from us in your Contract Manager.

Once acquired, deliver the materials to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

For advice on salvaging, consult <EM4>A Salvager's Guide to Material Collection</EM4> in your mobiGlas journal.

> Requirements <
     - Any class/size of salvage ship

> Disclaimer <
Contractors are responsible for ensuring that they are collecting materials from vehicles that are considered fair salvage under the pursuant UEE laws. Adagio Holdings is in no way liable for any crimes or misdemeanors committed by contractors and will offer no compensation or reparation for any persons affected by these actions.
